_note: Media gallery. Seven photographs were APPROVED by Dr Afli and are visible in-conversation, but the image FILES were not provided on disk, so no derivatives could be generated and nothing is published yet. Each record below is 'awaiting-file': drop the source file at the given expected_path, run scripts/process_images.py (or place pre-made web versions), rebuild, and they publish automatically. src stays null until a real file exists; the build skips any image without a resolvable src (fail-safe).
